#SalimKumarPassedAway #MalayalamCinema #Mollywood #RIPSalimKumar\n\n\nVeteran Malayalam actor and National Award winner Salim Kumar has passed away. He breathed his last at Amrita Hospital in Kochi following prolonged health complications at the age of 57.\n\nKnown for his iconic comic timing and brilliant character roles, his demise leaves an irreplaceable void in Indian cinema.
